name: finops-cloud-cost
description: FinOps & cloud-cost-engineering team — 4 agents (finops-practice-lead, cost-optimization-engineer, cost-allocation-engineer, ai-cost-governance-engineer) for cross-cloud cost governance. Covers the FinOps Framework (inform/optimize/operate), maturity crawl/walk/run, unit economics, showback/chargeback, tagging, FOCUS spec, rightsizing, commitment management (RIs/Savings Plans/CUDs), anomaly detection, and AI/GenAI token-cost governance. 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, Mermaid decision-tree knowledge bank, 6 best-practices, 1 advisory hook, and finops_calc.py. Cross-cloud cost is its domain; provider-specific infra defers to aws/azure/gcp-cloud; token app cost seams to claude-app-engineering. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
